name: skill-mania
description: Portable Agent Skills collection for Codex, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot.

interface.shortDescription: Portable reusable workflows for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: A portable Agent Skills collection for Codex, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and compatible clients, covering concise responses, minimal implementation, software development, testing, platform engineering, DevOps, design, design review, architecture, security, SEO/GEO, writing, editing, publishing review, skill curation, and agent context maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Use the laziest correct implementation that avoids unnecessary code.
Create DESIGN.md, plan/build UI, and run senior design review gates.
Implement, test, review, curate skills, or maintain agent context with the matching Skill Mania role.
